data.description:
## Why
Epic 88ab (elfish-chair-lug) S1. The feature-branch pattern needs Gerrit-side changes: vote-carry for re-merges after main advances (MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE), an explicitly pinned submit type (currently unset/inherited — FF-only or cherry-pick would defeat atomic merge-back), and a bounded write path for merge commits + feature branches.

## What
- `infra/gerrit/project.config`: LLM-Review `copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE OR changekind:MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE`; Verified copyCondition UNCHANGED (re-run posture — rationale in the ADR).
- Record the CURRENT effective inherited submit type (ssh/REST query, noted on this ticket) BEFORE pinning `[submit] action = merge if necessary` + `mergeContent = true`; apply in a quiet window (no open changes targeting main).
- ACLs: `Create Reference` + `Delete Reference` on `refs/heads/feature/*`; `Push Merge Commit` on `refs/for/refs/heads/main` + `refs/for/refs/heads/feature/*`; ALL bound to a new named group `feature-branch-drivers`.
- `infra/gerrit/setup-project.sh`: extend the managed-groups `want` dict (~line 57, currently Administrators + Service Users only) so the group is created/resolved declaratively and idempotently.
- ADR amending ADR-0013 (+ the 1fa8 Verified ADR): merge-change gate design, label-divergence rationale, group membership policy.
- `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` gate/ACL sections.

Inherited plan-review findings (run 3): membership policy must be constrained in the ADR — initial members = repo admins + named operating agents; changes via admin-approved setup-project.sh edit (f8e6233f). Back-out wording: "no label/gate changes REQUIRED" — the copyCondition addition is inert absent merge changes (MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE cannot match a non-merge patchset) and may be left or reverted (f51eb171/f90d5449).

## Scope
Gerrit config + setup script + ADR + setup docs only. No bot code (S2), no CI/g2p (S3), no contributor docs (S4).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] copyCondition change applied declaratively (refs/meta/config) and accepted by the running Gerrit 3.14.1
- [ ] Current inherited submit type recorded on this ticket BEFORE the [submit] pin lands; pin applied in a quiet window
- [ ] `feature-branch-drivers` group exists holding exactly the three ACLs; `setup-project.sh` converges it idempotently on re-run
- [ ] ADR merged: gate design, Verified/LLM-Review divergence rationale, membership policy (initial members + change process), copyCondition back-out note
- [ ] `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` updated
- [ ] Live negative checks: merge push by a non-member is refused; feature/* branch creation outside the group is refused
data.title: S1: Gerrit gate + ACL config — merge-carry copyCondition, submit-type pin, feature/* + pushMerge ACLs
